hero.tagline: I build web apps and {accent} with Bun, Node.js and TypeScript.

about.title: About me
about.body: I build full-stack web apps end to end. If an API has an endpoint, I'll integrate it. I work with TypeScript, Bun and Node.js, and occasionally venture into Python and PHP when there's no way around it. I'm not actively taking on work right now, but if the proposal is good, just reach out.

footer.quote: I bore witness to myself only when another named my passage.
